title: rubus fruticosus var. rhamnifolius
intro: Rubus fruticosus var. rhamnifolius, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Blackberry, is a variant of the blackberry plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rubus fruticosus var. rhamnifolius include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be used to make medicinal remedies and health supplements.
